changeSet.author: janesjeans
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE shop_products ( id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT DEFAULT '', price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'jeans' NOT NULL, subcategory VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT '', sizes TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', colors TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', images TEXT[] DEFAULT '{"placeholder.svg"}', in_stock BOOLEAN DEFAULT true NOT NULL, rating DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT 4.5 NOT NULL, reviews INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}', created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL )
